description: Composition White and red check top made of 100% cotton, has a round neck, key hole detail at the back, ruffle detail along the front, short puff sleeves and an elasticated hem Fit Regular Wash care Delicate machine wash at 30 degrees using mild detergent Do not dry clean, tumble dry, wring, scrub or bleach Dry flat in shade Warm iron Do not iron directly on print/embroidery Perfectly stylish and comfortable, this top from wrangler makes for a great casual wear. The puff sleeves create a feel of casual comfort, while the fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. Team this with slim fit jeans and sandals. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
